overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk through a wet urban environment near the Maze Bank Arena. The player moves from a billboard-lined path, across a street intersection, and along the perimeter of a large illuminated stadium with moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with concrete barriers alongside multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a path next to a concrete barrier, approaching a large illuminated billboard

entered.detail: large backlit billboard displaying three figures with text 'We're Number One'
white concrete divider with rectangular cutouts separating walkway from road
dark wet road surface reflecting street lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow walkway beside a wet road at night, with a prominent illuminated billboard ahead. The camera moves forward past concrete barriers, approaching an open intersection area.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with stadium visible in distance

events.description: exits narrow covered walkway into open intersection with wide street crossing
black sedan and other vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection while approaching the large stadium building on the left

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: large circular stadium with illuminated white facade and arched windows
overhead traffic signal showing green light
tall yellow-lit street lamps along the road

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with wet asphalt reflecting street lights. The Maze Bank Arena becomes visible in the distance on the left as vehicles pass through the crossing. The camera moves diagonally across the road toward the stadium.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium perimeter with entrance plaza and crosswalks

events.description: white box truck stopped at red light, waiting at the arena entrance intersection
turning left to follow the curved perimeter of the arena building

agents.ego_description: walking along the front of the arena, crossing the street in front of a waiting truck, then following the building's curve

notable_agents.action: white box truck waiting at the red traffic light at the arena entrance

entered.detail: large arched entrance to the stadium with illuminated facade
large white commercial truck stopped at the intersection
yellow painted fire hydrant on the street corner

segments.scene_description: Walking along the imposing front of the Maze Bank Arena, the camera passes the main entrance archway and crosses in front of a waiting white truck. The stadium's illuminated facade dominates the left side as the path curves around the building's perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along multi-lane road with retaining wall

events.description: moving from arena plaza onto sidewalk with concrete retaining wall and hedge
passing a female pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk away from the arena, passing a pedestrian and continuing alongside the road

notable_agents.action: woman in purple top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with hedge on top separating sidewalk from elevated area
tall palm trees visible behind the wall
illuminated billboard visible in the distance down the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a concrete sidewalk running alongside the road, with a retaining wall and hedge on the right. The Maze Bank Arena recedes into the background on the left as the camera passes a pedestrian and continues along the wet pavement toward distant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, billboard-lined walkway into the expansive, illuminated perimeter of the Maze Bank Arena. It begins on a wet path beside concrete barriers, moving forward until the space opens into a wide intersection where the asphalt reflects the glow of city lights. As the camera crosses the road diagonally, the imposing facade of the stadium emerges on the left, leading the viewer past a main entrance archway and a waiting white truck. The scene then shifts as the path curves around the building's perimeter, moving onto a concrete sidewalk bordered by a retaining wall and hedge. Finally, the arena recedes into the background as the camera passes a pedestrian and continues along the wet pavement toward distant city lights.
